name: Buttermilk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and cocoa in a saucepan. Add water.
2. Mix flour, sugar, baking soda, buttermilk, and vanilla with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
3. Gently add eggs; mix until well combined.
4. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
1. Melt butter and cocoa in a double boiler until hot.
2. Add buttermilk, then vanilla and superfine sugar. Beat until smooth. If needed, add more sugar to achieve desired consistency.
3. Allow frosting to cool slightly before spreading on the cake.
